channel.title: Automation on The Multi-Agent Future
channel.description: Recent content in Automation on The Multi-Agent Future

item.title: How Multi-Agent AI Is Replacing $200/Hour Legal Associates in Document Review
item.description: Law firms spend 60-80% of litigation budgets on document review. Multi-agent AI systems are cutting that by 90% while improving accuracy. Here's exactly how it works, with implementation prompts.

item.title: I Lost 40% of My Savings on Emotional Trades. So I Built an AI Agent to Trade For Me.
item.description: After a devastating 4AM liquidation, I decided to remove myself from the trading loop entirely. This is Part 1 of how I built OWUW Beat — an autonomous BTC trading system powered by AI agents.

item.title: OpenClaw + Telegram + Binance: The Stack Behind My AI Trading Agent
item.description: Why I chose OpenClaw as the agent framework, Telegram as the interface, and Binance as the execution layer — plus the setup gotchas nobody warns you about.

item.title: Vertical AI Agents: The Solo Founder's Best Shot at a $1M Business
item.description: Why vertical AI agents are the most asymmetric startup opportunity for solo founders in 2026, with specific niches, revenue models, and execution prompts.
